description_long: This is a compact, armored combat tactical vehicle with a low-profile, angular body and a prominent cylindrical main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features thick, sloped armor plating covering the entire body, with reinforced sections on the front and turret for added protection. The sides of the vehicle display directional arrow markings and a serial code 'TK-BZ120', suggesting identification or unit designation. The rear of the vehicle is flat and armored, with minimal external features except for a small hatch or panel. The color scheme consists of muted olive green and dark gray, with subtle blue highlights around the side panels. The overall design emphasizes durability, maneuverability, and offensive capability in urban environments.
description: A compact, armored combat vehicle with a large turret-mounted cannon, sloped green and gray armor, and directional markings on the sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the thick, sloped frontal armor and the large, centrally mounted cannon barrel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long cannon, turret structure, and visible arrow markings with the code 'TK-BZ120'.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the flat armored back, minimal external features, and the continuation of the green and gray color scheme.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with directional arrows and the turret's angular design clearly visible.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the front, turret, and sides; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive green and dark gray paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White directional arrows and the code 'TK-BZ120' on the side panels.
